slots.meaning: The child protagonist (a young animal or kid) hosting the picnic.
slots.guidance: A single kid-relatable protagonist who is capable, gentle, and never reckless.

slots.meaning: The whole open, sunny place the picnic and its errands happen in.
slots.guidance: A safe, open outdoor (or otherwise bright and cheerful) setting; wonder and warmth over any hint of danger.

slots.meaning: The single home base the hero always returns to, whether with a treat or after a setback.
slots.guidance: Always reachable, always safe and welcoming; the picnic grows here piece by piece.

slots.meaning: The gathering/celebration the hero is building toward (bare noun phrase, no leading article).
slots.guidance: A warm, communal celebration any small child would recognize as fun and safe.

slots.meaning: The collective group of friends who gradually gather for the celebration.
slots.guidance: A plural, friendly cast; never a source of peril to the hero or to each other.

slots.meaning: The small object or action the hero uses to call everyone together.
slots.guidance: A gentle, cheerful summons (a sound, a wave, a call); usable at any time, any number of times.

slots.meaning: The empty carrier the hero sets out at the start, which fills as the picnic grows.
slots.guidance: A simple, everyday carrying object appropriate to the theme.

slots.meaning: The place route A's errand is fetched from.
slots.guidance: A benign, kid-safe spot; nothing that bites, stings for real, or harms.

slots.meaning: The creature or thing announced when the hero picks route A at the hub.
slots.guidance: A distinct, friendly identity; clearly different from the other five errands.

slots.meaning: The treat route A brings back to the picnic.
slots.guidance: A carriable, edible-or-harmless treat; taking it harms nothing.

slots.meaning: Ending: the silly, harmless mishap when route A's risky choice is taken (setback). Names ending e_honey_oops.
slots.guidance: A funny, embarrassing hiccup with zero real harm; the hero always laughs and heads home to try again.

slots.meaning: The place route B's errand is fetched from.
slots.guidance: A benign, kid-safe spot.

slots.meaning: The thing announced when the hero picks route B at the hub.
slots.guidance: A distinct, friendly identity; clearly different from the other five errands.

slots.meaning: The treat route B brings back to the picnic.
slots.guidance: A carriable, edible-or-harmless treat.

slots.meaning: Ending: the silly, harmless mishap when route B's risky choice is taken (setback). Names ending e_berry_oops.
slots.guidance: A funny, embarrassing hiccup with zero real harm.

slots.meaning: The terrain route C's item is found in.
slots.guidance: A benign, kid-safe patch of ground.

slots.meaning: The plaything announced when the hero picks route C at the hub; also the plaything used again in the final game.
slots.guidance: A distinct, friendly identity; clearly different from the other five errands.

slots.meaning: Ending: the silly, harmless mishap when route C's risky choice is taken (setback). Names ending e_ball_oops.
slots.guidance: A funny, embarrassing hiccup with zero real harm.

slots.meaning: Ending: the closing game built around route C's plaything (success). Names ending e_ball_game.
slots.guidance: Positive; a joyful, safe group game.

slots.meaning: The place route D's item is found resting.
slots.guidance: A benign, kid-safe spot.

slots.meaning: The plaything announced when the hero picks route D at the hub; also the plaything used again in the final game.
slots.guidance: A distinct, friendly identity; clearly different from the other five errands.

slots.meaning: Ending: the silly, harmless mishap when route D's risky choice is taken (setback). Names ending e_kite_oops.
slots.guidance: A funny, embarrassing hiccup with zero real harm.

slots.meaning: Ending: the closing game built around route D's plaything (success). Names ending e_kite_game.
slots.guidance: Positive; a joyful, safe group game.

slots.meaning: The resting spot of the friend invited via route E.
slots.guidance: A benign, kid-safe spot the friend naps in.

slots.meaning: The sleepy friend the hero invites to the picnic via route E.
slots.guidance: A distinct, friendly, sleepy character; clearly different from the other five errands; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: Ending: the silly, harmless mishap when route E's risky choice is taken (setback). Names ending e_owl_oops.
slots.guidance: A funny, embarrassing hiccup with zero real harm; the friend is never hurt or upset.

slots.meaning: The spot route F's item sits closed on.
slots.guidance: A benign, kid-safe resting place.

slots.meaning: The plaything announced when the hero picks route F at the hub; also the plaything used again in the closing finale.
slots.guidance: A distinct, friendly identity; clearly different from the other five errands.

slots.meaning: Ending: the silly, harmless mishap when route F's risky choice is taken (setback). Names ending e_music_oops.
slots.guidance: A funny, embarrassing hiccup with zero real harm.

slots.meaning: Ending: the closing musical moment built around route F's plaything (success). Names ending e_music_finale.
slots.guidance: Positive; a cozy, shared musical moment.

slots.meaning: Ending: the closing group song (completion). Names ending e_song.
slots.guidance: Positive; a warm, communal singalong moment.

slots.meaning: Ending: the closing cozy nap (completion). Names ending e_nap.
slots.guidance: Positive; a peaceful, contented rest after the celebration.
